{{Infobox concept
| name = Imperial
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Imperial]] is the language spoken by everyone in the world according to [[Jyrine]]'s tutors.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c1">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Imperial]] is a language heard among humans.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Imperial]] is the standardized language of the [[Aurelian Empire]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Language and scripts]]
